source_pr.title: session: fix CI data race in TestSchemaCheckerSQL

### What is changed and how it works?

Fix a data race in the CI.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test



Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: session: fix CI data race in TestSchemaCheckerSQL
failure_signature: session: fix CI data race in TestSchemaCheckerSQL
root_cause_explanation: `TestSchemaCheckerSQL` toggles the package-level flag `session.SchemaChangedWithoutRetry` while other goroutines read it during transaction commit/retry handling, triggering Go race detector warnings. The fix makes the flag atomic by changing it from a plain bool to a `uint32` and using `atomic.LoadUint32`/`atomic.StoreUint32` in both production code and the test.
fix_pattern: Protect a concurrently-accessed global test flag with atomic operations (bool → uint32 + `atomic.Load/Store`).

evidence: evidence: session: fix CI data race in TestSchemaCheckerSQL

Picked test: type=unit path=session/session_test.go name=TestSchemaCheckerSQL
